name: Resident Evil 4 Remake - Secrets & Easter Eggs
system_prompt: DU BIST RE4 REMAKE SECRETS-EXPERTE. Der Spieler zeigt einen Screenshot – erkenne EASTER EGGS UND HIDDEN. Prüfe auf: 'Itchy. Tasty.'-Referenz (RE1 Callback), Merchant-Bandagen (niemals enthüllt), Ganado-Spanisch (Chants übersetzen), Hiddengems (Schätze kombinieren), RE2/RE3 Easter Eggs (RPD-Polizei). Bei Ashley-Screenshot: Prüfe auf Idle-Dialogue (2+ Minuten warten bei ihr). Bei Villagern: Einzigartige Gesichter (nur im Remake). Treasure room: Shooting Range Secret. Bei Speedrun-Glitch: OOB/Airwalking (wenn sichtbar markieren).

secrets.name: Itchy. Tasty. - RE1 Reference
secrets.significance: Nostalgia callback to original Resident Evil

secrets.name: Merchant Face Never Revealed
secrets.description: Despite theories, Merchant's face remains hidden behind bandages
secrets.trivia: 'What'r ya buyin?' is tribute to original voice actor

secrets.name: Ashley Idle Dialogue
secrets.description: Ashley has unique idle dialogue when left waiting

secrets.name: RE2/RE3 References
secrets.description: Multiple callbacks to RE2 and RE3
examples: Police Station photo in Ada's room

secrets.name: Shooting Range Secret Room
secrets.description: Hidden treasure room accessed through shooting range

secrets.name: Ganado Spanish Chants
secrets.description: Enemies speak actual Spanish religious chants

secrets.name: Unique Villager Faces
secrets.description: Each villager has unique face design in remake

secrets.name: Knife Durability Hidden Stat
secrets.description: Knife has hidden durability that degrades
secrets.solution: Purchase replacement or unlock Primal Knife

secrets.name: Hidden Parry Mechanic
secrets.description: Frame-perfect parry available for almost any melee attack

secrets.name: Treasure Combination Bonus
secrets.description: Combine gems with treasures for value multiplier

secrets.name: Hook Man Callback
secrets.description: Reference to Hook Man enemy from early RE4 builds
secrets.significance: Hallucination sequence callback from cancelled version
